visuals.title: Row ID by Ship Mode

visuals.rationale: Compare 'Row ID' across 'Segment' categories. Bar charts handle this well (3 categories).

visuals.title: Distribution of Row ID
visuals.rationale: Shows frequency distribution for 'Row ID'. Good for spotting skewness, outliers, or multiple modes.

visuals.rationale: Shows frequency distribution for 'Postal Code'. Good for spotting skewness, outliers, or multiple modes.

visuals.rationale: Scatter plot to check for correlation between 'Row ID' and 'Postal Code'.

visuals.rationale: Scatter plot to check for correlation between 'Row ID' and 'Sales'.

visuals.title: Sales vs Postal Code
visuals.rationale: Scatter plot to check for correlation between 'Postal Code' and 'Sales'.

visuals.title: Row ID share by Ship Mode
visuals.rationale: Part-to-whole breakdown with only 4 categories — pie chart is readable here.

visuals.rationale: Compare spread and outliers of 'Row ID' across 'Ship Mode' groups.
